title: W12: Epoch migration autopilot integration — audited repair, explicit apply, rollback
description:
Integrate the §13.6 migration autopilot at the stage where all of its real prerequisites exist: the W12 epoch ratchet and machine-diffed censuses, W8 epoch bridges/cache identities, W9 semantic diff and blame slices, and W11 Bloodhound's verified proof-repair engine. Audit an unchanged downstream project against the new epoch; locate the earliest failed constraints and affected surfaces; propose minimal source/config/import/termination/instance/simp repairs; run lockstep old/new builds; validate every candidate through Athanor, Crucible, and the configured consensus policy; and emit an explicit apply transaction with a sealed rollback bundle. It never edits a project without an explicit apply.

Issue-tracker integration must respect D2: shipped FrankenLean tooling never spawns br or any third external tool. The ratchet emits a deterministic, schema-versioned migration-issue manifest with one row per moved symbol/divergence and exact br import/apply instructions for the repository-maintenance harness or human operator; applying that manifest is outside release-binary execution and is separately receipted.

Acceptance: a synthetic epoch delta and at least one real historical Lean migration run end to end; unchanged projects that need no repair remain byte/semantic clean; repaired projects build under the new epoch with every patch kernel-checked; rejected or partially applied migrations restore exactly from the rollback root; unclassified divergences block publication; migration issue manifests are deterministic and complete.

Verification: unit tests for census-to-impact mapping and transaction preconditions; property tests for rollback identity/idempotent re-apply; repair-ranking and explicit-consent negatives; lockstep divergence fixtures; and shared no-mock E2E scripts covering audit -> propose -> verify -> preview -> explicit apply -> rollback, with detailed old/new roots, patch hashes, receipts, issue-manifest rows, commands, final states, and first-divergence logs.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
acceptance_criteria:
The epoch migration autopilot consumes real W12 census/surface diffs, W8 epoch/cache identities, W9 semantic diff/blame, and W11 verified repair. It audits unchanged projects, identifies earliest failed constraints and affected surfaces, proposes minimal source/config/import/termination/instance/simp repairs, lockstep-builds old and new epochs, and validates every candidate through Athanor, Crucible, and configured consensus. It never changes a project without an explicit previewed apply transaction and sealed rollback root; rejected, cancelled, failed, or partial applies restore byte-identically. Projects requiring no repair remain byte/semantic clean, and unclassified divergences block publication. Release binaries never spawn br: they emit one deterministic schema-versioned migration-issue manifest row per moved symbol/divergence with exact maintenance-harness/human import instructions; external application is separately receipted. Unit/property/model/mutation tests cover census-to-impact mapping, blame/ranking, preconditions, explicit consent, idempotent reapply, stale roots, conflict detection, issue completeness/order, cancellation/resources, rollback identity, and recovery; named silent-apply, skipped-kernel-check, incomplete-manifest, wrong-epoch, partial-rollback, and divergence-normalization mutants are killed. Real no-mock E2E runs a synthetic epoch delta and at least one historical Lean migration through audit, propose, verify, preview, explicit apply, new-epoch build, rollback, refusal, and recovery, with strict old/new roots, patch hashes, receipts, issue rows, first divergence, cleanup, and final state. All dependencies, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, dual-epoch/corpus/mutation/fault lanes pass. No implicit edit, release-time third-tool spawn, heuristic unverified patch, mock-only migration, hidden unclassified divergence, incomplete issue manifest, irreversible apply, or deferred listed behavior satisfies closure.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — exact rollback is valid only while the preconditioned project root remains unchanged. Concurrent user edits, new files, lock drift, or external effects cause typed refusal and a conflict/recovery bundle; they are never overwritten or silently merged. Mutation/fault E2E covers every apply/verify/publish boundary, concurrent edits, cancellation, disk/resource refusal, idempotent retry, and exact preservation of user state.

EVIDENCE CONTRACT — strict canonical semantic NDJSON and separately linked bounded telemetry are mandatory. Semantic records contain normalized ids/inputs/roots, typed outcomes, resource class/consumption, decisions, first divergence, cleanup, and exact final state; host, PID, time, paths, cache and performance stay telemetry-only. Validators reject unknown versions, missing/extra/duplicate fields, broken linkage/order, truncation, merged streams, and telemetry in authoritative roots. Productive 1/8/32 applies where safely parallel; named unit/model/property/mutation/fuzz and real no-mock positive/failure/recovery E2E close claims.
notes:

1. Unit coverage: deterministic happy-path, boundary, malformed-input, resource-exhaustion, cancellation, and failure-atomicity cases for every new public behavior; property/metamorphic and mutation-kill tests wherever an invariant or equivalence is claimed.
2. E2E coverage: add or extend at least one shared scripts/e2e scenario for the real user-visible path, plus a negative/recovery scenario. Release-level evidence uses the no-mock lane (real Reference binary/artifact/filesystem/editor/process/host as applicable). A mock may support a unit test but may not close an L-level, PG gate, or public claim.
3. Detailed logs: emit both concise human logs and schema-versioned NDJSON with run/scenario/step ids; bead, claim, invariant, Parity-Ledger row, and gate ids; exact command/argv with secrets redacted; cwd; epoch/mode/profile/platform/thread-count/seed/cache-state/host facts; canonical input hashes; expected vs actual; monotonic start/end/duration; resource and budget facts; exit status/signal; stdout/stderr artifact references; receipt/logical roots; first-divergence data; cleanup and asserted final state. 4. CI/closeout: archive logs, fixtures, repro bundles, and evidence manifests; failures must be diagnosable from artifacts alone. Run scripts/check.sh, cargo test, the bead-specific unit/property suites, relevant Tribunal differential/mutation/fault lanes, and the shared E2E scenario. The close evidence names every test/scenario id and artifact location; skips require a typed, logged, honest L-level limitation and may not satisfy the skipped claim.

title: W6: Builtin census + Mirror facade — census-total, evidence-leveled, no hidden oracle
description:
Implement the builtin census + generated Mirror facade v1 (§4.3, Appendix C): mechanical extraction over the pinned Init/Std/Lean sources emitting the census (symbol, Lean signature, universe/binder telescope, module, kind, attributes, extern symbol, effect class, PARTITION CLASS: toolchain-api / library-code / user-facing-data) and, from the toolchain-api subset, generated facade stubs (upstream signature, telescope, effect class) whose bodies call the native Vellum/Athanor/Crucible/Golem/Anvil/Marrow services.

The three laws: (1) census TOTALITY — no unclassified symbol; a symbol the census cannot classify blocks the surface L-level, never gets guessed. (2) Fidelity by evidence (FL-INV-03) — every toolchain-api row proven against the oracle: fixture differentials, golden decision traces, the metaprogram-corpus rig; a row whose API intrinsically exposes internal object identity or allocation order is classified at its honest L-level with a Behavior Note, never hand-waved. (3) No hidden oracle (D8) — the fallback for a facade defect is fixing the native implementation against fixtures; there is no run-the-upstream-definition switch in any release binary. Every row states: symbol, upstream semantics anchor (source location at the pin), equivalence class (bit/obs/perf), evidence, determinism class, L-level.

Acceptance: G3 requirement — Init/Std elaborate end-to-end from source with every builtin either native-behind-its-row or library-code source-elaborated, zero upstream implementation executing; census diff tooling ready for epoch advances; the G0-8 resistance list resolved row by row. Tests: census-totality CI check; facade-stub compile checks against real metaprogram code; per-row differential fixture families.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.

title: W2: Marrow & Grimoire — ABI twin, object model, environment, olean codec
description:
Workstream W2 "Marrow & Grimoire" (§6, §7): the runtime/ABI twin and the environment/module codec — the load-bearing act of drop-in compatibility and the spine of gate G1.

Marrow: the Reference object model implemented exactly in Rust under the lean_* exported names (header packing, tag bytes, scalar-field packing, odd-tagged-pointer small Nats, tri-state RC discipline), with layout constants compiled from the GENERATED contract tables of §6.5 — never transcribed. Two heaps, one membrane (§6.1b): CompatHeap (exact ABI layouts, membrane-only allocation, unsafe confined to fln-unsafe-abi) vs NativeHeap (typed asupersync region handles for toolchain-internal structures); values cross only through generated converters; no raw Compat pointer ever enters the kernel (D22). Owned size-classed allocator with the heartbeat hook (fuel parity lives here). Compacted regions: construction, mmap-load, relocation — deliberately the SAME code path the olean codec uses.

Grimoire: the environment as persistent HAMT-style maps with O(1) snapshots and logical roots (§7.1); total contractual interning with alpha-canonical digest lane (§7.1b); olean codec read (three validation levels) and faithful byte-identical write (FL-INV-04); .ilean codec; olean-next frontier lane; import-at-daemon-scale shared heap (§7.5). Effects ride asupersync behind Reference IO/Task semantics (§6.7). fln-libm owned deterministic transcendentals (§6.8). Exit: G1 spine ready — real mathlib oleans resurrect, re-emit byte-identically, and load into the Reference.

## Success Criteria

All scope and outcomes stated above remain mandatory, and every dependency/child deliverable required for this epic or gate must be completed at its honest evidence level. The MANDATORY EPIC/GATE CLOSEOUT CONTRACT in Notes must pass with coverage mapping, no-mock E2E evidence, detailed archived human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, reproducible environment facts, and every skip/divergence classified. No feature, compatibility surface, invariant, performance gate, or release claim may be silently narrowed, dropped, or replaced by a prototype.
acceptance_criteria: W2 closes only when Marrow and Grimoire form one proven compatibility spine across the generated ABI and OLEAN contracts. CompatHeap implements exact lean_object headers, tags, scalar packing, small-Nat encoding, tri-state RC, allocation classes, heartbeat charging, and every exported ownership convention; NativeHeap uses typed region handles; generated converters are the only membrane, and no raw Compat pointer or unsafe boundary can enter the kernel or checked declarations. Persistent environments, extension registries, module/provenance graphs, term interning, collision handling, logical/provenance roots, and O(1) snapshots preserve exact semantics, deterministic canonical identity, structural sharing, typed budgets, FL-INV-05 conservatism, and failure atomicity. One compacted-region construction/load/relocation path serves mmap and codec use. Olean read validates structural, semantic, and paranoid levels; faithful write and ilean emission are byte-identical and atomically promoted; corrupt/truncated/future artifacts are bounded typed outcomes; olean-next remains frontier-isolated. Reference IO/Task effects ride asupersync with capability receipts, fln-libm is bit-locked across platforms, D2 subprocess capsules are the sole optional cc/git path, and real inbound plugins plus the upstream stage0 ABI gauntlet pass without fallback. Exhaustive unit/property/model tests and named mutations cover every ABI field/tag/retain-release transition, allocator boundary, membrane conversion, PMap/term/store operation, root and snapshot law, relocation/codec field, effect outcome, libm vector, subprocess policy, and plugin failure. Real no-mock E2E spans mathlib olean load/re-emit/mixed consumption, upstream generated C, plugin execution, IO/Task, mmap sharing, corruption/resource/cancellation/crash/disk-full refusal, exact restoration, and clean recovery with strict evidence bundles. G1-spine evidence plus all W2 child gates, scripts/check.sh, full cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, codec/mutation/fuzz/fault/thread/platform rigs are green. No handwritten layout, raw-pointer laundering, vector-sized snapshots, hidden oracle, external-runtime substitute, silent artifact repair, timing-only resource claim, optional tool on reproducible paths, or deferred listed W2 feature satisfies closure.
notes:
MANDATORY EPIC/GATE CLOSEOUT CONTRACT:
This epic/gate may close only when every child deliverable is complete; the verification registry maps every implemented public behavior, FL-INV claim, Parity-Ledger row, Behavior Note, and PG/gate claim to named unit/property/mutation coverage plus a shared no-mock E2E scenario; detailed human + schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts are archived; all divergences and skips are classified; no mock-only evidence is used for a release claim; and the final evidence bundle records exact reproduction commands, environment/epoch/mode/platform/thread/seed/cache facts, input hashes, receipts/logical roots, expected final states, first divergences, and cleanup results.

title: W6: Deterministic dataflow scheduler — speculative parallelism, canonical merge, perturbation-validated effects
description:
Implement the deterministic dataflow scheduler (Bet B4, §10.6): declarations as dataflow nodes — parse yields a conservative dependency pre-scan; elaboration proceeds speculatively in parallel asupersync regions against O(1) environment snapshots; a declaration that reads a not-yet-committed name suspends on its true dependency or aborts-and-retries; commits merge in CANONICAL ORDER (source order per module; module order per Ledger topology) so the resulting environment, diagnostics, and InfoTrees are those of sequential elaboration — bit-for-bit, at any thread count (FL-INV-01 by construction, the invariant upstream Elab.async demonstrably lacks).

Mechanics: optimistic concurrency — transactions get source-order IDs; commit-time read-set validation against the latest committed predecessor either commits in canonical order or discards/rebases; no last-writer-wins anywhere; conflicting extension mutations serialize. Side-effecting commands are ordering barriers detected conservatively: unknown effects serialize; known-commutative registered effects parallelize. Command effect summaries (ReadsDecl(name, Type|Value|Attributes), ReadsInstances(head), ReadsSimpSet, ReadsGrammar, ReadsOption, WritesDecl, WritesInstance, WritesGrammar, WritesEnvExtension, UsesCapability, Opaque(reason)) are captured dynamically and validated BY PERTURBATION: mutate an allegedly-unread input, require the product unchanged; a failing perturbation demotes the producer to Opaque and opens a Parity-Ledger bead. Cross-module speculation rides Ledger hashes-in-flight; mis-speculation costs a retry, never a wrong answer.

Acceptance: PG-5 thread-matrix {1,8,32} bit-identical environments/diagnostics/artifacts per commit on the corpus; speculation win measured against the sequential baseline; perturbation validator running in CI. Tests: DPOR-bounded schedule exploration of the merge protocol under the asupersync lab; abort/retry storm fixtures; seeded effect-summary lies must be demoted.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
acceptance_criteria:
Declarations execute as asupersync regions against O(1) snapshots using conservative dependency pre-scan and dynamic read/effect sets. Source-order transaction ids, predecessor validation and canonical source/module commit order make environment, diagnostics, InfoTrees, artifacts, roots and receipts byte-identical to sequential elaboration at every thread count; no last-writer-wins exists. Missing committed dependencies suspend or retry, and conflicting extension writes serialize. Typed effect summaries cover declaration type/value/attributes, instances, simp, grammar, options, extensions and capabilities; unknown effects are barriers. Perturbation mutates every allegedly unread input, requires identical products, and atomically demotes lying producers to Opaque with evidence and follow-up. Cross-module speculation binds Ledger hashes-in-flight and wrong speculation only retries. Unit/property/model/metamorphic/DPOR/mutation tests cover commit/rebase/abort, dependency discovery, retry storms, barriers, conflict sets, cancellation/resources, failure atomicity, fairness and recovery; named read-set lie, out-of-order commit, last-writer, dropped-diagnostic, effect misclassification and nondeterministic-seed mutants are killed. Real no-mock corpus E2E runs 1/8/32 threads per commit and 96 or more weekly, injects schedule/effect/cancellation faults, restores, and retains strict schedule/read/effect/root/first-divergence bundles. PG-5 is bit-identical across the certified matrix; speculation performance is reported separately from correctness. All dependencies, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, lab/perturbation/thread/mutation/fault lanes pass. No timing-based merge, unordered diagnostics, permissive unknown effect, hidden global state, nondeterministic retry, mock-only scheduler, performance-for-fidelity trade, or deferred listed behavior satisfies closure.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — this bead closes the intra-module scheduler and effect core: stable source ids, immutable snapshots, canonical commit/rebase, typed read/effect capture, DPOR, and perturbation. Capture and perturbation detect omissions but do not prove completeness; enforcement uses typed interception with total unknown-to-Opaque fallback. A commutative effect requires reviewed merge-law evidence. Ledger hashes-in-flight and full cross-module speculation move to a downstream W8 integration bead. Named suites: scheduler_commit_model, effect_summary_completeness, scheduler_productive_thread_matrix_e2e.

W6-W8 EVIDENCE CONTRACT — authoritative evidence is canonical schema-versioned semantic NDJSON validated independently; telemetry is a separate non-authoritative stream and cannot affect hashes, comparison, admission, cache, publication, or promotion. Validators reject unknown versions, missing/duplicate ids, broken step order, unbound artifacts, silent truncation, merged streams, and cleanup/final-state mismatch. Cancellation, exhaustion, and InternalFault never enter cache, negative storage, proof admission, or promotion. Productive 1/8/32 records prove useful overlap, completed work, retries, and schedule identity. Named unit/model/property/mutation/fuzz suites and real no-mock positive/failure/recovery E2E are mandatory.

title: fln-hash canon: recursive Expr/Level decoders stack-overflow (SIGABRT) on deep untrusted input
description:
Canonical Expr and Level decoding currently uses recursive descent once per attacker-controlled nesting tag. A compact malicious artifact or wire payload can exhaust a normal Rust worker stack and trigger an uncatchable SIGABRT, violating the decoder totality contract, D8, and FL-INV-07. Replace both recursive readers with explicit heap-backed state machines while preserving the exact canonical wire format, result values, typed errors, and compatibility for legitimate deep mathlib terms. A hard nesting cap is not an acceptable substitute because it can reject valid artifacts; caller resource budgets may stop work only through the typed inconclusive/resource path.

## Steps to Reproduce

In a sacrificial child process or spawned thread with an explicit 8 MiB and 2 MiB stack, feed a valid schema header followed by a long Expr App-tag chain, and separately Level Succ/Max/IMax chains, without enough leaves. Increase depth until the current implementation prints stack overflow and exits by SIGABRT. The established reproduction overflows around 20k to 50k Expr frames in release on 8 MiB and around 1k to 2k in debug; exact thresholds are evidence, not acceptance constants. Fatal probes must never execute in the main test-runner process.

## Acceptance Criteria

Expr and Level decoding use no input-depth recursion in tag parsing, child scheduling, assembly, or error cleanup. The implementation accepts every previously valid byte sequence subject only to existing format and explicit resource rules; emits byte-for-byte identical canonical re-encodings and hashes; reports malformed, truncated, over-budget, cancelled, and allocation-failure cases through stable typed outcomes; performs linear work in consumed input plus produced nodes; and cannot panic or abort on arbitrary bytes. State-machine invariants, frame variants, maximum pending work, and partial-value cleanup are documented.

Named unit/property/mutation tests cover every Expr and Level constructor; truncation at every field boundary; invalid tags/indices/lengths; highly unbalanced and alternating shapes; at least 100k attacker-controlled nesting tags under a 2 MiB stack; random malformed bytes; budget and cancellation boundaries; and old-versus-new semantic/wire/hash equivalence on exhaustive shallow plus corpus fixtures. A real no-mock CLI/artifact E2E runs bounded-stack child probes for deep malformed inputs, asserts typed exit with no signal/hang/survivor, then performs a clean recovery decode. Emit concise human logs and bounded schema-versioned NDJSON with seed/depth/shape/input hash, stack/build/toolchain/host, budgets/timings/resources, expected versus actual, exit/signal, stderr/stdout artifacts, first divergence, cleanup and final state. The separate franken_lean-canon-stack-safe-drop-6gy bead owns destruction of successfully built very deep DAGs and blocks the parent fln-hash closeout.
design: Use iterative explicit work frames for Expr and Level. Each frame records the constructor tag, already decoded scalar fields, the next child slot, and child results; a separate value stack assembles nodes only after all children succeed. Reads remain canonical and forward-only, lengths/indices remain checked before allocation, and partial failures unwind heap containers rather than the call stack. Preserve error precedence and offsets exactly where they are compatibility-visible. Prove depth-independent call-stack usage with a bounded-stack child test and mutation-kill a deliberately recursive variant. Do not use unsafe code, increase thread stacks, catch aborts in-process, leak partial trees, or add a semantic depth cap.
acceptance_criteria: All requirements in the description and design are mandatory. The old fatal reproducer exits through a typed error in 100 consecutive bounded-stack child runs for both Expr and Level families with zero SIGABRT, panic, hang, or survivor; clean inputs immediately afterward decode and hash identically. The complete unit/property/mutation/corpus differential suite and the real child-process E2E pass with independently valid detailed logs. franken_lean-canon-stack-safe-drop-6gy remains an explicit blocker for full fln-hash lifecycle closure.
notes: MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE (inherits franken_lean-rur; additive to this bug): unit/property/mutation coverage must exercise all constructors and every malformed, resource, cancellation, and failure-atomicity boundary. The real no-mock bounded-stack process scenario plus failure/recovery is required. Human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts record exact redacted command/cwd, epoch/profile/toolchain/host/stack, seed/input hash/depth/shape, expected versus actual, monotonic timing, resource budgets, exit/signal, stdout/stderr references, first divergence, cleanup and final state. Archive fatal-reproduction metadata without running fatal probes in the main harness; close evidence names all tests, artifacts, and reproducible commands. A skipped or mock-only case cannot satisfy the safety claim.

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text:
ROOT CAUSE (Claude Fable review session, 2026-07-22): crates/fln-hash/src/canon.rs Expr::read_body and Level::read_body are recursive-descent decoders that recurse once per nesting level of ATTACKER-CONTROLLED bytes (Expr via App/Lam/ForallE/LetE/MData/Proj/Sort/Const; Level via Succ/Max/IMax). There is no depth bound. A crafted artifact that is just a schema header followed by a chain of EXPR_APP tag bytes (0x05) drives unbounded call-stack recursion.

REPRODUCTION (verified): decode a chain of ~2,000,000 EXPR_APP tags on a std thread with an 8 MiB stack (Linux default; what std/asupersync worker threads get) -> 'thread has overflowed its stack; fatal runtime error: stack overflow, aborting' (SIGABRT). Threshold on 8 MiB stack: release build overflows between depth 20k-50k (~200 B/frame); debug build overflows between 1k-2k (~4 KB/frame); a 2 MiB spawned test thread overflows around a few hundred. So a <=2 MB malicious .olean/receipt/olean-next artifact or wire message aborts the whole process/daemon.

This is masked on the dev box ONLY because ulimit -s is unlimited there (recursion just gets slow, no crash). It is fully reachable on any normal deployment.

SEVERITY: violates the codec's own stated contract (canon.rs:11 'Decoding is total over arbitrary bytes: every failure is a typed CanonError, never a panic') and doctrine D8 / FL-INV-07 (malformed artifacts/protocol messages must not panic; a stack-overflow abort is strictly WORSE than a panic — uncatchable, kills the process, no typed Inconclusive). The canon codec is exactly the untrusted-input surface (decl content digests, receipts, olean-next, Diagnostic-on-the-wire).

WHY A DEPTH CAP IS NOT THE FIX: any hard recursion cap safe on the smallest realistic decode stack (~hundreds on a 2 MB test thread) is BELOW what legitimate mathlib oleans can reach (long app spines, nested binders in the low thousands), so a cap would false-reject valid artifacts — breaking the .olean read surface, which §4.1 forbids breaking casually. The correct fix is an ITERATIVE (explicit heap work-stack) decoder: decode depth bounded by heap (input size), not call stack — no overflow, no false rejects.

COVERAGE GAP that let this exist: the existing 'malformed_inputs_are_typed_errors_never_panics' test only exercises small malformed inputs; it never tests deep nesting.

RELATED latent issue (separate, note only): dropping a very deep valid Expr/Level tree (nested Arc<ExprNode>) also recurses in Drop and could overflow — but that requires already holding a deep tree in memory. Out of scope for this decode-path fix; worth a follow-up if deep valid oleans exist.

FIXING NOW in this session: converting both decoders to iterative explicit-stack machines that preserve the exact wire format, plus a bounded-stack regression test. canon.rs is committed-clean and idle (mtime 4h).

title: G0-9: Instrumented-oracle spike — golden decision traces schema, volume, replay rig
description:
G0-9 Instrumented-oracle spike (§22.1-9, feeds §18.3): patch the Reference IN THE TRIBUNAL SANDBOX (build-time-only, test-only, never shipped, never linked — D8) to dump decision traces at the points our native machinery must match — unifier approximation choices, postponements, unfoldings and their order, instance-search candidate orders and outcomes, macro expansions, simp rewrite firings, heartbeat consumption — on a pilot corpus, and prove the trace schema, volume, and replay-rig design.

Why this exists: under the Oracle-Only Law there is NO hosted upstream engine to fall back to, so the unifier/instance/simp fidelity burden (Critical risk R2) is carried entirely by evidence. Golden decision traces at Corpus scale are the strongest available mitigation: Athanor, Synod, and Anvil are implemented AGAINST the traces, not against vibes, and trace-replay rigs run continuously thereafter.

Acceptance: (a) the patched-oracle build recipe is scripted, hashed, and reproducible in the sandbox; (b) trace schema versioned and validated (typed events, source anchors, stable ids); (c) volume measured on the pilot corpus with a stated projection to Corpus scale (storage in the Tribunal frankensqlite store); (d) a replay rig prototype diffs a hand-written toy unifier against traces to prove the comparison machinery. Traces are fixtures, never components; the generator lives behind the D8 wall. Tests: the pilot traces + replay rig land in fln-conformance as the seed of the continuous golden-trace lanes.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
design:
TraceContractV1 makes instrumentation noninterference a prerequisite, not an assumption. Each event carries schema/epoch, declaration/request/phase IDs, causal parent and scope stack, event-family tag, family-local payload, deterministic source anchor and ordinal, completeness/truncation state, and exact resource facts. Pointer addresses, allocator order, host paths, timestamps and compression layout never define semantic identity.

The exact clean Reference binary and patched binary with tracing disabled must agree on acceptance, diagnostics, environment/artifact bytes, generated names and heartbeat/depth facts. With tracing enabled, the patched run must preserve those same outputs and decision order. Trace capture cannot allocate through or otherwise perturb the counted Lean path; heartbeat capture uses an out-of-band/preallocated mechanism or an equivalently demonstrated non-perturbing design. Repeated-run divergence is retained and classified, never normalized away. A patch that changes the observed program is not an oracle.

Backpressure, event/byte/depth/storage limits, interruption and corruption yield a typed incomplete trace with authority=false. An incomplete trace may diagnose but cannot become a golden fixture or implementation target. Raw trace chunks are content-bound before optional compression/indexing; decompression and index rebuild recover the exact event stream. Retention policy distinguishes authoritative raw fixtures from rebuildable indexes and telemetry.

The replay prototype covers every event family, not only the toy unifier: at least one independent minimal consumer/checker for unifier/postponement/unfold, instance search, macro expansion, simp firing and heartbeat/depth events, with planted omission, reordering, payload and outcome divergences. Replay comparison reports the earliest causal divergence without over-normalizing observable order.

G0 DECISION INTEGRATION — emit exactly one G0SpikeDecisionV1 whose domain payload is TraceContractV1. Outcome is RatifyInstrumentedOracleContract, AmendTraceContract, or NoGo mapped to Ratified/Amended/NoGo. Ratification requires noninterference, complete representative event-family replay/checker coverage, bounded raw/compressed/indexed volumes, causal ids/scopes, D8 boundary scans, productive deterministic work where parallel, and independent regeneration from raw traces. Missing event families, incomplete trace presented authoritative, patch perturbation, replay-only self-consistency, schema/root mismatch, hidden oracle reachability, telemetry mixed into semantics, Inconclusive/InternalFault, or a trace volume with no viable archival/replay contract blocks.

PRODUCTIVE THREAD AMENDMENT — fixed governed pilot inputs run at 1, 8, and 32 threads with actual nonempty trace-capture/replay/index-validation partitions wherever event dependencies permit and deterministic canonical reduction of semantic artifacts. Intrinsically ordered event production remains ordered and is not counted as parallel work. The semantic trace/event/index roots and G0 decision are identical across the matrix; host/scheduler/timing variation remains telemetry. A relabeled sequential loop, empty worker partitions, schedule-derived event ids/order, or thread-profile mismatch blocks ratification.
acceptance_criteria:
A scripted, hashed, reproducible, build-time/test-only Reference patch in the Tribunal sandbox emits versioned typed traces for unifier approximations/postponements, unfold choices/order, instance candidate order/outcomes, macro expansions, simp firings, heartbeat/fuel consumption, source anchors, stable declaration/event ids, and explicit truncation/resource facts on a reviewed pilot corpus. The patch and traces remain fixtures/generators only, never linked, shipped, or callable as a FrankenLean component; source and artifact scans prove the D8 wall. Schema validation rejects unknown/duplicate/out-of-order/impossible events and binds exact pin, patch, binary, corpus and environment roots. Volume, compression, indexing and replay costs are measured with raw pilot data and a justified Corpus-scale frankensqlite projection plus bounded retention policy. A replay prototype drives a hand-written toy unifier and detects planted choice/order/outcome divergences with exact first-divergence output, proving comparison machinery rather than mere logging. Unit/property/model/mutation tests cover schema/events, stable ids, ordering, truncation, resource/cancellation/fault behavior, storage/replay, and D8 compile-out; named dropped-event, reordered-candidate, unstable-id, over-normalizer, hidden-oracle, and surviving-divergence mutants are killed. Real no-mock E2E builds the patched Reference, records/replays pilot traces, plants/restores a divergence, handles interruption/corruption, and retains strict build/trace/store/process/cleanup bundles. The traces and replay lane enter permanent CI; dependencies, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS and artifact scans pass. No runtime oracle component, unversioned ad-hoc text log, sampled trace without manifest, mock-only Reference, silently truncated trace, divergence normalized away, unsupported volume claim, or deferred listed event family satisfies closure.

A noninterference matrix compares clean, patched-disabled and patched-enabled Reference runs over every pilot fixture and repeated seeds. Governed semantic outputs, decision events and heartbeat/depth counters must match exactly; timing may differ only in the separate telemetry stream. Source patch, build inputs, binary, configuration and run manifests are content-bound. D8 compile-out and release-artifact scans prove no patch, generator entry point or oracle-call path is reachable from product binaries.

Event-family schema/model/property tests cover nesting, causal parents, ordinals, stable anchors, every payload/tag, repeated/failed branches, truncation, chunking, compression, index reconstruction, limits, cancellation, corruption and recovery. Mutants perturb instrumentation behavior, allocate on the counted path, omit/reorder/duplicate an event, destabilize IDs, mark truncated complete, rebuild a different stream, over-normalize a divergence, hide an oracle path or merge telemetry; each is killed discriminatingly.

The real lane records and independently replays at least one representative scenario for every required family, plus combined traces, planted divergences, exact restoration, interrupted/incomplete capture, corrupt chunk/index and clean recovery. Productive repeated/thread-profile runs use fixed governed inputs; any Reference nondeterminism remains an explicit finding and cannot be converted into a golden total order.

Strict semantic evidence contains pin/patch/binary/corpus/declaration/event/scope/parent IDs, source anchors, completeness, raw/chunk/compressed digests, limits/usage, expected/actual event and first causal divergence, authority, mutation, restoration and final state. Host/timing/volume telemetry is a separate bounded stream. Validators reject patch/input drift, noninterference failure, missing families, incomplete golden traces, cross-stream contamination, unstable IDs, wrong mutants, surviving divergences or unsupported Corpus-scale projection.
notes:
MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE (inherits franken_lean-rur; additive to this bead's own Tests/Acceptance):
1. Unit coverage: deterministic happy-path, boundary, malformed-input, resource-exhaustion, cancellation, and failure-atomicity cases for every new public behavior; property/metamorphic and mutation-kill tests wherever an invariant or equivalence is claimed.
2. E2E coverage: add or extend at least one shared scripts/e2e scenario for the real user-visible path, plus a negative/recovery scenario. Release-level evidence uses the no-mock lane (real Reference binary/artifact/filesystem/editor/process/host as applicable). A mock may support a unit test but may not close an L-level, PG gate, or public claim.
3. Detailed logs: emit both concise human logs and schema-versioned NDJSON with run/scenario/step ids; bead, claim, invariant, Parity-Ledger row, and gate ids; exact command/argv with secrets redacted; cwd; epoch/mode/profile/platform/thread-count/seed/cache-state/host facts; canonical input hashes; expected vs actual; monotonic start/end/duration; resource and budget facts; exit status/signal; stdout/stderr artifact references; receipt/logical roots; first-divergence data; cleanup and asserted final state. Never swallow stderr, never leak secrets, and bound adversarial log volume.
4. CI/closeout: archive logs, fixtures, repro bundles, and evidence manifests; failures must be diagnosable from artifacts alone. Run scripts/check.sh, cargo test, the bead-specific unit/property suites, relevant Tribunal differential/mutation/fault lanes, and the shared E2E scenario. The close evidence names every test/scenario id and artifact location; skips require a typed, logged, honest L-level limitation and may not satisfy the skipped claim.

title: W3: Crucible K2 — NbE accelerator, memoized whnf, cross-checked against K1
description:
Implement Crucible engine K2, the NbE accelerator (§8.3): normalization-by-evaluation with environment-aware closures, memoized whnf keyed on (term-hash, transparency), lazy delta with definitional-height comparison — the engine that makes decide, big Fin computations, and mathlib defeq-heavy corners fast (the PG-1/PG-2 arithmetic depends on it; the design was priced by spike G0-7).

Laws: K2 implements the SAME judgments as K1 (one KERNEL_CONTRACT); K2 verdicts are spot-audited against K1 continuously (sampled per run, exhaustively in Tribunal soaks) and any disagreement fails loudly and ships as a fixture; every fast-lane shortcut carries exactly one registered justification — a local proof argument in the kernel design note, a certificate checked by a simpler routine, or differential evidence (which licenses an optimization and never impersonates a proof). The size covenant counts K2 lines too. Cache keying uses the alpha-canonical digest lane (§7.1b) so alpha-varied duplicates share reduction work invisibly to metaprograms.

Acceptance: the G0-7 twenty-problem tail suite meets the envelope the PG-2 model requires; K1/K2 continuous cross-check wired and green on the full fixture corpus; PG-1 trajectory measured (full mathlib olean recheck time on the 32-core profile). Tests: differential K1-vs-K2 on generated term storms; memoization-correctness property tests (cached verdict == fresh verdict under transparency changes); fuel-parity fixtures shared with G0-6 stay green on both engines.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
design: FL-INV-02 ACCELERATOR BOUNDARY — K2 may accelerate the same judgment but cannot expose a second admission API or mint an accepted state through unchecked memoized data. Cache entries and NbE shortcuts remain internal evidence; the common fln-kernel authority gate validates status, epoch, environment root, declaration hash, resource outcome, and required K1 cross-check policy before any opaque checked result exists. Unknown/stale cache versions recompute and disagreement halts.
acceptance_criteria:
K2 implements exactly the K1/KERNEL_CONTRACT judgments using NbE with environment-aware closures, alpha-canonical term digests, memoized whnf keyed by term/environment/transparency and schema, and lazy delta ordered by definitional height. Every optimization has one registered local proof, simpler checked certificate, or clearly scoped differential justification; none can mint acceptance outside the common kernel authority. Cache entries are internal evidence, versioned and root-bound; stale/unknown/mismatched entries recompute. Configured deterministic content-seeded K1 cross-checking runs continuously and exhaustive fixture/soak cross-checking finds zero disagreement; any mismatch halts, retains both traces and shrinks a fixture. Unit/property/model/metamorphic/mutation suites cover cached-versus-fresh equivalence under transparency/environment/epoch changes, binders, alpha variants, universes, fuel, budgets, cancellation, eviction, concurrency, and authority; named stale-key, unsound-sharing, wrong-delta, skipped-cross-check, forged-cache-success, and fuel-drift mutants are killed. The twenty G0-7 tail fixtures meet the ratified PG-2 envelope with identical judgments and raw tail evidence, and fuel-parity fixtures agree across engines. Real no-mock K1/K2 E2E runs corpus and generated term storms, plants cache/cross-check divergences, restores, and retains strict key/root/verdict/trace/resource bundles. Dependencies, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, line covenant, differential/mutation/fault/thread/performance lanes pass. No second admission API, unchecked memoized verdict, runtime-random sampling, speed-for-semantics trade, timing-only validation, hidden stale reuse, unresolved disagreement, or deferred listed K2 behavior satisfies closure.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — cache and memo keys bind canonical environment root, local-context identity, transparency, epoch/schema/build, all read dependencies, and completion status. Hashes accelerate lookup but never establish equality: injected collisions compare canonical keys and cannot cross-hit. Partial, cancelled, exhausted, Inconclusive, InternalFault, or dependency-unknown work cannot be cached as a semantic answer or negative. Property tests cover canonical-key equality, collision buckets, invalidation, and failure-atomic retry.

EVIDENCE CONTRACT — authoritative output is strict schema-versioned canonical semantic NDJSON containing normalized inputs, roots, typed outcomes, resource class/consumption, decisions, first divergence, cleanup, and exact final state. Host, PID, wall time, temporary paths, cache/performance facts, and scheduler details live only in a separately linked bounded telemetry stream and cannot enter authoritative digests. Validators reject merged streams, unknown versions, extra or missing fields, broken linkage/order, silent truncation, or telemetry-root drift. Productive 1/8/32 runs prove nonempty completed work and deterministic reduction rather than thread-count labels.

1. Unit coverage: deterministic happy-path, boundary, malformed-input, resource-exhaustion, cancellation, and failure-atomicity cases for every new public behavior; property/metamorphic and mutation-kill tests wherever an invariant or equivalence is claimed.

title: W3: fln-checker — structurally independent checker, WASM-clean, consensus seat
description:
Implement fln-checker, the independent kernel checker (§8.3b): a deliberately DIFFERENT second implementation, not a feature flag over fln-kernel — separate normalization algorithm (eager where K1/K2 are lazy), simpler persistent maps and substitutions, its OWN decoder over Grimoire canonical wire objects (never the primary heap nodes), no dependency on the unsafe membrane, an independently derived error-class mapping, a separate build artifact, and a WASM build for a foreign execution substrate (the WASM Judge second engine).

Non-sharing is proven STRUCTURALLY: CI verifies fln-checker shares data schemas but no semantic implementation modules with fln-kernel (dependency-graph rules). The checker joins the consensus policies of §8.3c: standard (deterministic content-seeded sample + all high-risk forms — never runtime randomness), release (full closure), paranoid (everywhere, optionally distinct hosts). The honest economics: roughly 2x kernel CPU where it runs, single-digit percent end-to-end (PG-1b measures it). Common-mode risk R6 (shared Judgment Specification misreading) is why FOREIGN witnesses (lean4checker, lean4lean via export) exist in the council; this bead includes wiring the external-witness sampling seam.

Acceptance: full agreement with K1/K2 on the corpus; a seeded spec-divergence mutant (deliberately misimplement one rule in a test build) is caught by the differential lane; WASM build passes the same vectors bit-for-bit. Tests: non-sharing CI check; consensus-policy integration tests where a planted disagreement HALTS publication with both traces attached (never outvoted).

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
design: FL-INV-02 CONSENSUS BOUNDARY — fln-checker is an independent veto/evidence seat, never an alternative admission authority. Its verdict and WASM/foreign witness results are serializable evidence but cannot construct the fln-kernel opaque checked state. Tests attempt receipt replay, forged checker success, stale-root success, unknown policy/version, and all-negative/one-positive vote combinations; none may publish when fln-kernel rejects or is inconclusive.
acceptance_criteria:
fln-checker is a separate artifact and genuinely independent implementation: its own canonical-wire decoder, eager normalization strategy, maps/substitutions, error mapping and code modules; it shares only reviewed data schemas with fln-kernel, has no unsafe-membrane dependency, and builds/runs WASM-clean. Structural CI derives workspace dependencies/source ownership and rejects semantic implementation sharing. It agrees declaration-by-declaration with K1/K2 across the complete required corpus and identical native/WASM vectors. Standard policy uses deterministic content-seeded samples plus all high-risk forms, release checks the full closure, paranoid checks everywhere and may use distinct hosts; runtime randomness is forbidden. Checker/foreign-witness verdicts are veto/evidence seats only and cannot construct the kernel opaque accepted capability; any disagreement halts with traces, never votes through publication. Unit/property/model/differential/mutation tests cover each rule, decoder discrepancy, policy/sample determinism, stale roots, unknown versions, malformed wire objects, resource/cancellation outcomes, native/WASM identity, receipt replay, forged success, and all vote combinations; a seeded spec-rule divergence is detected. Real no-mock consensus E2E runs K1/K2/checker plus foreign witnesses, plants one-engine disagreements, restores, and retains strict policy/sample/root/verdict/trace/publication bundles. PG-1b overhead is measured honestly with raw samples and never used as correctness evidence. Dependencies, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, nonsharing/unsafe/dependency guards, WASM/differential/mutation/platform lanes pass. No feature flag over kernel, shared semantic module, checker-as-authority, quorum override, random sampling, mock-only WASM/foreign witness, unresolved disagreement, or deferred listed behavior satisfies closure.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — the independent checker includes a deliberately simple numeric implementation whose semantic code, normalization, algorithms, and test-oracle path are not shared with fln-bignum or K1/K2. Shared wire schemas are allowed; shared decision code is not. Build-graph and seeded common-bug checks enforce this non-sharing boundary, while cross-implementation property and real artifact tests require agreement.

EVIDENCE CONTRACT — authoritative output is strict schema-versioned canonical semantic NDJSON containing normalized inputs, roots, typed outcomes, resource class/consumption, decisions, first divergence, cleanup, and exact final state. title: W5: Golem runtime integration — generated intrinsics, effects, plugins, G2 parity
description:
Integrate the production Golem execution stack after its independently testable components exist: validated FIR-to-FLBC output, the FLBC interpreter host-call ABI, the census-generated intrinsic table, Marrow allocation/RC, asupersync IO/Task effects, initializer ordering and capability receipts, and the inbound Reference-plugin loader. This bead owns the no-mock end-to-end proof of the §11 claim; component beads may prove their own stable interfaces without pretending that future components already exist.

Required behavior: compile and execute real user-class Lean code (mathlib-style tactics, project macros, lakefile-shaped configuration, #eval and IO/Task bodies) on ABI-valued registers; cross interpreted code <-> native intrinsics <-> Reference-built plugin calls with zero representation conversion; preserve initialization/extension ordering; count heartbeats through the same allocator hook; enforce typed budgets and cancellation; retain RC balance and ownership-shadow evidence; record capability and plugin provenance. No test stub, prototype intrinsic, or oracle artifact may satisfy production acceptance.

Acceptance: the G0-3 corpus is promoted to the complete production stack; #eval/IO/Task and plugin results match the Reference at each registered comparison class; PG-7 interpreter measurements are emitted against the W1 baseline; the C4 inbound matrix is green at honest per-platform L-levels; initialization-DAG and capability receipts are complete; two runs at each certified thread count produce identical logical results and evidence identities where required.

Verification: unit contract tests at every component seam plus shared no-mock E2E scripts for pure computation, IO/Task ordering, capability denial, cancellation, panic/partial guards, plugin load/run/crash, and RC/heartbeat accounting. Every scenario emits the mandatory human and NDJSON evidence with the first cross-boundary divergence and final ownership/obligation state.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
acceptance_criteria:
Complete only when every Required behavior and Acceptance item in the description is demonstrated, the mandatory verification note is satisfied, and the close evidence names the exact unit/property/mutation suites plus shared no-mock E2E scenario IDs and archived human/NDJSON artifact locations. In particular: execute the G0-3 corpus on the complete production Golem stack; match each registered Reference comparison class; produce PG-7, C4, initialization-DAG, capability, determinism, RC-balance, cancellation, plugin-failure, and final-state evidence; and leave no production claim resting on a stub, mock, prototype intrinsic, hidden oracle, or unclassified divergence. This bead is the primary W5 mitigation owner for risk R12: profile real user code and metaprograms before optimization, publish distributions and tolerance thresholds, preserve fidelity under every optimization, and if PG-7 or PG-M misses, expand measured native-facade fast paths or Iron-JIT scope and downgrade the performance claim rather than changing semantics. The R12 handoff to fln-o0j and G6 binds exact corpus, host, interpreter/compiled mode, facade coverage, hot paths, raw samples, and unresolved bottlenecks.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — G2 proves execution beginning at W5 elaborated-term ingress through compiler, bytecode, VM, runtime, effects, and ABI boundaries. Full native source-to-execution through Athanor and the Mirror is G3; this bead cannot imply W5 already contains those subsystems. Fixtures state their ingress authority and compare typed results, effects, receipts, cleanup, and failure outcomes without runtime Reference fallback.

title: W5: Initialization + capability-scoped effects — ordering, --pure-elab, receipts
description:
Implement initialization + capability-scoped effects (§11.5): initialize / builtin_initialize ordering, import-time extension replay interleaving, and real-world IO effects exactly as upstream — under asupersync capabilities, so a --pure-elab audit mode can DENY ambient filesystem/network/clock to metaprograms and report exactly which declarations demanded them.

The posture: capability-scoped metaprogramming is a sound-mode observability win and a frontier-mode sandbox, NEVER a semantic change to compliant code (faithful mode default ambient authority approximates an ordinary Lean process — drop-in means unchanged packages just run, with effects OBSERVED into provenance). Initialization DAG receipts (from the plugin door, §6.6) unify with this: cycles, duplicate initializers, and late capability requests are explainable. This bead also covers the interaction with Golem-hosted lakefile execution (Ledger, §13.3) — lakefiles are user code with declared effect surfaces.

Acceptance: initializer-ordering fixtures match Reference-observable behavior incl. interleaving with extension replay; --pure-elab on a corpus with known effectful metaprograms reports exactly the offender set; capability events land in Palimpsest with correct spans. Tests: ordering property tests over generated init DAGs; denial fixtures (a denied capability yields typed CapabilityDenied naming the alternative, never silent substitution — D2 discipline); provenance-completeness checks against the perturbation validator.

Faithful mode preserves ordinary ambient behavior while observing it; sound --pure-elab denies undeclared authority with typed CapabilityDenied naming the declaration, requested capability, source span, and viable alternative, never silently substituting behavior.
3. Capability and initialization events enter Palimpsest with complete declaration/span/causal provenance. Golem-hosted lakefile execution uses the same policy and declared effect surface. title: G0-4: Hygiene & syntax fidelity spike — macro-heavy corpus tree/position diff
description:
G0-4 Hygiene & syntax fidelity spike (§22.1-4, feeds §9): parse a curated set of macro-heavy Corpus files and compare Syntax trees, byte positions, and hygiene observables against the Reference (driven through its own frontend under instrumentation in the Tribunal sandbox).

Hygiene is the classic reimplementation graveyard: macro scopes appended to names, quotation/antiquotation semantics, macro_rules matching, and the parse/elaborate interleaving (a command can install a parser used three lines later) are all API surface that metaprograms and diagnostics observe. This spike visits the graveyard early. Curate files whose MEANING depends on hygiene corner cases: scope-shadowing across macro expansion, antiquotation splices, syntax categories with custom precedence, notation-priority interactions, auto-bound implicit capture.

Acceptance: (a) node kinds, atom/ident structure, SourceInfo (original vs synthetic, whitespace attachment, UTF-8 byte positions) byte-agree on the curated set; (b) hygiene-decorated generated names agree under the stable-expansion-path derivation; (c) every divergence triaged: fidelity defect (fix) or undocumented-upstream-behavior (fixture + upstream report + Behavior Note candidate); (d) findings feed the fln-syntax / fln-parse interface freeze. Tests: the curated set becomes the standing hygiene fidelity rig in fln-conformance, run per-commit.

## Acceptance Criteria

All bead-specific requirements, acceptance conditions, tests, invariants, compatibility surfaces, evidence levels, performance gates, negative/recovery cases, and user-visible behaviors stated above remain mandatory. In addition, the MANDATORY VERIFICATION DEFINITION OF DONE in Notes must be satisfied with named unit/property/mutation suites, at least one shared real-path no-mock E2E scenario plus failure/recovery coverage, detailed human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, and reproducible close evidence. No listed feature or claim may be silently narrowed, deferred, mocked, or declared complete through an unclassified divergence.
design:
REVIEW AMENDMENT — consume franken_lean-foo’s hashed instrumented-Reference build, patch boundary, event ids, and trace schema. G0-4 owns syntax/hygiene fixture selection, semantic comparison, and the Vellum interface decision; it must not create a second ungoverned patch or incompatible macro-trace dialect.

The fixture manifest binds exact source/import bytes, options, active grammar/parser state at every command, Reference binary/patch/schema roots, expected tree/diagnostic/expansion roots, comparison class per observable, coverage rationale, and every exclusion. It includes successful and malformed/recovery sources without treating recovery as acceptance. Coverage spans tokenization/trivia/UTF bytes, original/synthetic SourceInfo, dynamic grammar epochs, Pratt precedence/associativity, macro_rules, scopes/capture, quotations/antiquotations/splicing, generated identifiers, diagnostics, and parse/elaborate interleaving.

An observed pinned upstream quirk becomes a mandatory faithful fixture. It is not a Behavior Note escape hatch. A Behavior Note candidate is allowed only for a deliberately reviewed sound-mode divergence whose faithful path remains exact.

Emit one G0SpikeDecisionV1: RatifyVellumSyntaxAndHygieneContracts, AmendSyntaxOrExpansionIdentity, or NoGo, with separate decision rows for tokenization, tree shape, SourceInfo/trivia/UTF positions, grammar interleaving, macro scopes, quotation/antiquotation, generated ids, diagnostics, and recovery. The fidelity/determinism claim is invariant with OBSERVED fixture evidence; parser/scope state models are bounded_model.

Budgets cover source bytes/tokens, tree nodes/depth, grammar epochs/registrations, macro steps/depth, generated names, source-map/diagnostic bytes, oracle events, output, and logs with checked boundaries, cancellation/nonpublication, and retry. Independent models cover Pratt precedence, scope/capture, quotation splicing, and grammar-epoch transitions. Productive 1/8/32 work partitions real fixtures/commands while preserving within-file parse/elaborate order and canonical reduction. Semantic output excludes timing/host/PID/path telemetry.

Prototype Vellum and the governed instrumented Reference produce byte-/comparison-class-correct tokens, trees, SourceInfo/trivia/UTF positions, grammar epochs, scopes, quotations/splices, generated names, diagnostics, recovery, and acceptance. Named syntax_fixture_manifest, pratt_precedence_model, hygiene_scope_capture_model, quotation_splice_model, grammar_epoch_transition_model, syntax_budget_matrix, and g0_4_no_mock_e2e suites cover boundaries, cancellations/resources/retry and productive 1/8/32 fixture work. Mutants include stale parser, byte/character drift, scope drop/capture, precedence/associativity, source normalization, timing-derived name, comparison downgrade, hidden exclusion, second patch/schema, partial publication, and fake thread. Every upstream quirk remains a faithful fixture; sound divergence needs a reviewed Behavior Note with faithful exactness intact. title: W10: Backends & ABI doors — Iron native backend, JIT, C parity, outbound plugins
description:
Workstream W10 "Backends & ABI doors" (§17.3, §17.4, §11.3): the sovereign compilation path and the bidirectional plugin promise.

Scope: Iron static backend — FLBC to native objects/executables (x86-64, aarch64 first) with NO LLVM, no cranelift, no cc: the owned baseline emitter grown a static mode; lake build of executables with zero external toolchain (the G6 headline). Iron-JIT (frontier, standard-mode only, fln-unsafe-jit): baseline template JIT with inline caches burned in; results bit-identical to the interpreter by construction, spot-checked by a standing dual-run rig; certified builds never enable it. --backend c parity generator: emit C in the Reference idiom and drive the USER toolchain exactly as upstream leanc does (D2 optional tool #1) — parity apparatus and exotic-target escape hatch, never the anchor. Both backends dual-run governed: Iron pinned to interpreter results, interpreter pinned to Reference observable evaluation semantics on the differential corpus. ABI door outbound (§17.4, the harder direction, staged to G5): FrankenLean-built plugins loading into the Reference host, per-platform Tribunal matrix; inbound (Reference plugins into FrankenLean) lands earlier under W2/G2. Risk R5 honesty: outbound tiers per platform in the Parity Ledger rather than blocking G5.

## Success Criteria

All scope and outcomes stated above remain mandatory, and every dependency/child deliverable required for this epic or gate must be completed at its honest evidence level. The MANDATORY EPIC/GATE CLOSEOUT CONTRACT in Notes must pass with coverage mapping, no-mock E2E evidence, detailed archived human and schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts, reproducible environment facts, and every skip/divergence classified. No feature, compatibility surface, invariant, performance gate, or release claim may be silently narrowed, dropped, or replaced by a prototype.
acceptance_criteria:
W10 closes only when the reviewed target/profile and WASM packaging decisions are frozen before backend interfaces and every backend remains observationally pinned to Golem and the Reference corpus. Iron static mode lowers validated FLBC to real x86-64 and aarch64 objects/executables, including ABI calls, relocations, exceptions, stack maps, RC/FBIP behavior, debug/unwind policy, linking, and deterministic emission, with no LLVM, Cranelift, system assembler, linker, or C compiler. Real Lake projects build and run with cc absent. Iron-JIT is frontier/standard-only inside fln-unsafe-jit, dual-runs against the interpreter, revokes safely, and is structurally absent from certified/faithful artifacts. The C backend emits the Reference-compatible idiom and uses only the explicit D2 user compiler capsule; it is parity/exotic-target apparatus and excluded from reproducible sets. native_decide Tier 2 trace-guided replay admits only kernel-checked discharges. FrankenLean-built outbound plugins load into real Reference hosts across the declared C4 matrix with exact ABI/ownership/initialization behavior and honest per-platform evidence tiers. Unit/property/model/differential/mutation suites cover every instruction selection, relocation, ABI lowering, object format, optimizer/JIT guard, C emission, subprocess policy, plugin boundary, unsupported target, cancellation/resource limit, and recovery; named wrong-code, nondeterministic-layout, JIT-leak, hidden-cc, unchecked-replay, and ABI-ownership mutants are killed. Real no-mock E2E builds/runs native executables without cc, dual-runs interpreter/JIT/static/C outputs, loads outbound plugins, injects malformed objects/plugin crashes/tool absence, restores exact state, and retains strict platform bundles. All W10 children, target/profile and packaging contracts, scripts/check.sh, cargo/fmt/clippy/UBS, codegen differential/fuzz/mutation/fault/reproducibility/platform/performance lanes are green. No external codegen backend, shell-out assembler/linker, JIT in certified paths, C-backend anchor, mock-only host/plugin, unclassified platform gap, timing-only correctness claim, or deferred listed W10 feature satisfies closure.

REVIEW AMENDMENT — JIT exists only in frontier plus standard products and is absent from faithful, sound, and certified artifacts. Static Iron remains the certified path. Leak scans enumerate all shippable targets, features, profiles, symbols, and capabilities; a runtime flag alone is insufficient. Planted JIT symbol/product/capability contamination must fail before publication.

EVIDENCE CONTRACT — strict canonical semantic NDJSON and separately linked bounded telemetry are mandatory. Semantic records contain normalized ids/inputs/roots, typed outcomes, resource class/consumption, decisions, first divergence, cleanup, and exact final state; host, PID, time, paths, cache and performance stay telemetry-only. Validators reject unknown versions, missing/extra/duplicate fields, broken linkage/order, truncation, merged streams, and telemetry in authoritative roots. Productive 1/8/32 applies where safely parallel; named unit/model/property/mutation/fuzz and real no-mock positive/failure/recovery E2E close claims.
notes:
MANDATORY EPIC/GATE CLOSEOUT CONTRACT:
This epic/gate may close only when every child deliverable is complete; the verification registry maps every implemented public behavior, FL-INV claim, Parity-Ledger row, Behavior Note, and PG/gate claim to named unit/property/mutation coverage plus a shared no-mock E2E scenario; detailed human + schema-versioned NDJSON artifacts are archived; all divergences and skips are classified; no mock-only evidence is used for a release claim; and the final evidence bundle records exact reproduction commands, environment/epoch/mode/platform/thread/seed/cache facts, input hashes, receipts/logical roots, expected final states, first divergences, and cleanup results.

title: fln-kernel K1: literal-acceleration slice — KR-313 Nat ops + KR-314 String expansion (wires fln-bignum)
description: Follow-up to franken_lean-5p2. KR-313: on Nat literals the kernel computes succ/add/sub/mul/div/mod/gcd/pow(exp≤2^24)/beq/ble/land/lor/xor/shiftLeft/shiftRight (pin anchor type_checker.cpp:609 reduce_nat; divergence note: no Nat.blt at this pin — beq/ble only), gated on closed terms; requires wiring fln-bignum into fln-kernel (covenant already names fln-bignum as an allowed dependency). Also Nat.zero ⇄ lit 0 normalization so literal-vs-symbolic constructor forms are defeq (the k1_judgments comment in kr316_nat_literal_majors_convert_to_constructor_form marks exactly this boundary). KR-314: a String literal is defeq to its String.ofList constructor form both directions, and projection/recursor machinery expands literals the same way (anchor type_checker.cpp:1030) — closes the inductive_reduce_rec Str-literal early-return documented in tc.rs. Converts the remaining nat-literal replay family (5 in Init.Prelude: UInt*.ofNatLT/Char.ofNatAux) plus any decidability cases blocked on literal arithmetic. Verification: operation-table tests vs known values including the pow cap and the no-blt divergence note, mutation kills (wrong op mapping, dropped cap), replay census before/after, gates + covenant (LOC growth budgeted — bignum calls, not reimplementation).
acceptance_criteria: 1. KR-313 implements the complete pinned Nat literal operation table and exact dispatch/arity/closed-term guards, Nat.zero and constructor/literal normalization, the documented pow cap and no-Nat.blt pin behavior, and typed FL-INV-07 resource outcomes before oversized allocation. KR-314 expands String literals at every required recursor, projection, and defeq rung; KR-304/KR-308/KR-310 interactions discovered by replay remain covered. 2. Named public-authority unit/property tests cover all operations, boundary and large values, wrong operation/arity/head, zero and successor forms, offset and lazy-delta cases, string fold direction, recursor/projection behavior, and typed exhaustion. Mutation tests kill wrong mapping, missing cap, zero-normalization loss, offset errors, successor off-by-one, string reversal, over-acceptance, projection-index weakening, and missing recursor normalization. 3. The real no-mock replay accepts the complete pinned target census with zero rejected or inconclusive rows, decodes the full pinned stdlib with zero identity cross-check failures, exercises typed corruption rejection, and proves pristine recovery. 4. Replay evidence is retained as schema-versioned line-oriented NDJSON with rule/bead, fixture/hash, census totals, contract epoch, budget, expected/actual verdict and diagnostics, resource facts, mutation/corruption classification, artifact paths, cleanup, and final state. Repeated identical semantic records are deterministic apart from explicitly excluded timing/path fields. 5. fln-kernel and workspace tests, format, warnings-denied Clippy, UBS, and dependency/unsafe/LOC covenant gates are green; the fln-bignum dependency remains within the closed universe and no arithmetic authority is duplicated inside the kernel.
close_reason: Landed as ee425e8. Init.Prelude replay census: 1744/1755 -> 1755/1755 accepted, 0 rejected, 0 Inconclusive — the full pinned Prelude now replays through the kernel. All 11 decoded residuals closed, but the decode sharpened once more mid-flight: the 6 match auxiliaries + 5 ofNatLT/ofNatAux cases fell to KR-313 (reduce_nat in the whnf loop, pin :609) + the KR-308 offset machinery INSIDE lazy delta (pin :973) + the KR-304 decide shortcut (pin :1062); the LAST residual (List.get.match_1) was a different missing rule entirely — KR-310's projection half (pin :1101, same-index Proj pairs close on defeq scrutinees; the pair was PProd.0 of a List.rec stuck on an mdata-wrapped fvar, invisible to the renderer until the new first_divergence locator exposed it). KR-314 landed in all three pin sites (recursor major, proj scrutinee, defeq rung; String.ofList is a DEF at this pin — expansion is whnf'd to the real ctor). Divergence notes pinned by test: no Nat.blt; pow cap 2^24. FL-INV-07: oversized shift/pow results are typed Inconclusive BEFORE allocation (charge_bulk) — deliberate Behavior Note vs the pin (which grinds/OOMs). Verification: 14 new tests in k1_judgments (63 total, named per KR rule); 9-mutant campaign (mutation_campaign: div/mod swap, pow-cap drop, Nat.zero-operand drop, offset-zero-lit drop, succ-peel off-by-one, unreversed string fold, literal-pair over-acceptance, proj-idx-guard drop, string-rec whnf drop) — all KILLED by named tests, source byte-restored. Shared no-mock E2E scripts/e2e/kernel_replay.sh extended with a census-floor lane (accepted=1755, rejected={}, inconclusive=0 — regression trips it); full scenario green incl. 158,608-constant stdlib decode differential, corruption sweep (4/8 typed kills, 0 panics), recovery. Gates: fmt, clippy -D warnings, cargo test workspace (83 suites), ubs (0 critical), structure-guard (covenant 2,758/12,000 LOC; kernel->bignum edge acknowledged on main by BrightPelican f67b795). Typed limitations: reduce_native (Lean.reduceBool/Nat) remains a named follow-up slice (under-reduction only); bignum ABI-limb layout + PG-K stay on franken_lean-npl pending 53v.
